title: Invitation Homes: Still Inviting To Investors
text: Invitation Homes recently disappointed investors by paring guidance, citing higher property tax assessments and rising bad debts. Despite concerns regarding bad debts, their portfolio remains healthy and is over 97% occupied, with collection rates of around 97% as well.

title: Buy 6 November 2022 Dividend Closers
text: Kiplinger.com, dogsofthedow.com, and growthinvesting.com all published November lists of stocks of note to close this year of 2022. Their seven "closer stock" articles covered: Best Stocks; Best Dow stocks; Prosperous Healthcare Stocks; Top-Rated Housing; Consumer Staples; Inflation Stocks; Tops of 2022.

title: These Were The Five Best- And Worst-Performing Real Estate Stocks In October 2022
text: Real estate stocks help investors insulate their portfolio against rising inflation.
